headline: Is Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Now Offering Value After Its 31% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Broadridge Financial Solutions at around US$154.79 is good value or not, the key is understanding what the current price actually reflects. The stock has slipped about 3.8% over the last week, 17.1% over the past month, and 29.8% year to date, contributing to a 31.0% decline over the last year, even though the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 11.0% and 8.3% respectively. These moves have kept Broadridge on the radar for investors who are watching how the market...
